Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Remnant]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 1''' — Remnants are substances or items that can be molded by Soulsmiths.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Remnants are constructions of pure madra freed from their physical bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — When a sacred artist of enough power dies, they leave their soul behind as a living force known as a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — The tree-Remnant is a purple, skeletal construction of madra shaped like a leafless tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — Remnants hunger for pure human madra and can develop consciousness if they consume it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 2''' — The fruit shines with the bright color of a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 3''' — Breaking a sacred tree can release a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Remnants can advance over time like humans and sacred beasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Remnants have only fragments of their memories from life and are narrow in scope.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 16''' — Remnants are described as shadows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — A Remnant can be made of Mountain's Heart power and appear like an outline of an ogre painted in dirt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 17''' — Taking in a Remnant is the difference between Jade and Gold.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 18''' — A Remnant of the sword aspect is powerful in combat but weak in pursuit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — A Remnant of an expert beyond Gold was thought to be sealed in the ancient tomb but had cut through its restraints.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Remnant is composed of Forged madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 19''' — The Remnant leaks silvery motes of essence during battle.}}

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — A Remnant can be held in a core at the Gold stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Remnant is wrapped around her waist like a belt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — The Remnant flickers with blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Remnants are often disoriented when they are born.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — Remnants look as though they have been painted onto the world in lines of color.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Remnants are creatures encountered by Lindon and Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — Remnants are creatures or objects found in the Wilds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — The Jai spear devours the strength of Remnants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — To advance from Jade to Gold, a sacred artist must take on the power of a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — A Remnant can be dissected into its functional components.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 10''' — A Remnant's corpse can be seen as unusual in a camp of sacred artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 11''' — A Remnant can peel itself out of a person's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Remnants gain power and intelligence by consuming human madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 13''' — Kral has a tiny Remnant on his arm.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — A master can leave behind a Remnant of powerful madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — Remnants are parts of sacred beasts that can be tricky to handle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 16''' — Remnants attack Lindon regularly.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Remnants can be restricted by script circles.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Remnants are creatures that gather where vital aura is thick.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 18''' — Remnants can emerge from walls.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — A Remnant is a body without muscle to cut through.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Remnants contain madra that dreadbeasts can eat.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Remnants look like a collection of brush-strokes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — Remnants can be dissected using specialized tools.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — A Remnant attacked Lindon with purple madra that stuck to his ankle like spider's silk.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — The Remnant that attacked Lindon was tall and sunken with long limbs and a fish-like face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 1''' — A Remnant can be swatted like a fly by someone powerful enough.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 2''' — Jai Long has a Remnant in his core that is blending with his own madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — A Remnant can leave behind techniques or powers to a successor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Remnant looked like a constellation of bright light points forming joints, hands, eyes, and a heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 4''' — The Remnant's roar sounded like a bonfire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 5''' — A Remnant is a stage of progression higher than an Iron.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — Remnants are made of solid madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 6''' — A strong enough suction force in the core can contain a Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — A Remnant can be broken down for power by digesting its skills and madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — A Remnant can provide excess energy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin has a death-grip on her Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Remnant in Lindon's pack has sapphire eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 21''' — The Remnant's power can cleanse and restore madra.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 7''' — Remnant limbs can retain their own life and will.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 12''' — The arm is a Remnant's arm.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 1''' — A Remnant is a prosthetic limb made of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 3''' — A Remnant of black clouds launched itself forward after an explosion.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — A Remnant can rise from a body as a silver-blue light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — A Remnant looks like a wire model of the original creature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 8''' — A Remnant was attempting to rise from a new body.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — An apparition behind the Sage appeared like a Remnant, manifesting as a large silver and purple book with a Remnant eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — A dying Remnant provides essence in an underground chamber.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — A Remnant's corpse can look like a donkey fashioned of rainbows and bleed multicolored essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — Lindon has a white Remnant limb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — A Remnant appeared as a hulking figure like an armored giant with a smooth boulder for a face and metallic madra flesh.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 8''' — Remnant pieces do not always combine as expected.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 13''' — Remnants are used in the Everwood continent.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The training dummy is assembled from Remnants of sword, earth, or force madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — A Remnant can rise from a person's body and inherit their thoughts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — A Remnant is a construct or entity that can be forged from madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 3''' — A Remnant can rise from a corpse.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — An Overlord's Remnant can be destroyed by spiritual damage.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 6''' — Sacred artists can take Remnants into their spirit.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 13''' — Beings stronger than Archlords do not often leave Remnants when they die.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — The Archlady restored her Remnant after being struck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Remnant Lindon strengthened for Kelsa gave her denser and better balanced madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — Remnants are notoriously unreliable.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — A Remnant can act as a leash for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — The Remnant is a mute nightmare skeleton in Yerin's classroom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Remnants are echoes of people from their lives.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Remnants use up pieces of themselves as they work.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — A Remnant beamed at Mercy and encouraged her not to give up.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — A dim purple light was the Remnant rising after Malice's death.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — A Remnant can be integrated into a person's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — The Remnant is a being that once was a lion but now looks like a man.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
